ranked_movies.title: Airplane!
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed and highly recommended in the David Zucker AMA. Frequently cited as one of the greatest comedies ever made, known for its rapid-fire jokes and iconic quotes.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended across multiple threads (r/horror, r/MUAEntertainment) as a top-tier comedy horror film. A cornerstone of the genre.

ranked_movies.title: The Naked Gun
ranked_movies.reason: A central topic of the David Zucker AMA. Frequently mentioned alongside 'Airplane!' as a defining work of spoof comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Tucker and Dale vs Evil
ranked_movies.reason: The original inspiration for the r/horror thread and repeatedly recommended as a quintessential comedy horror film in multiple discussions.

ranked_movies.title: This Is Spinal Tap
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the r/MovieSuggestions thread about 'bad' bands and also listed as a top 80s comedy. A foundational mockumentary.

ranked_movies.title: Cabin in the Woods
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently recommended in the r/horror comedy thread. Praised for its meta-commentary on the horror genre and comedic elements.

ranked_movies.title: Rush Hour
ranked_movies.reason: The central example in the r/okbuddycinephile post about interracial comedy series. Recognized as a highly successful and beloved franchise.

ranked_movies.title: Hot Fuzz
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the r/horror thread (as close enough) and listed as a top comedy in the general suggestions thread. Part of the acclaimed Cornetto Trilogy.

ranked_movies.title: Blazing Saddles
ranked_movies.reason: Listed multiple times in the general comedy suggestions thread. A classic, iconic satire from Mel Brooks.

ranked_movies.title: Young Frankenstein
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the r/horror comedy thread and the general comedy suggestions thread. A beloved parody of classic horror films.

ranked_movies.title: Harold and Kumar Go to White Castle
ranked_movies.reason: Cited in the r/okbuddycinephile post as a key example of a successful interracial comedy franchise. Described as 'kino of the highest order'.

ranked_movies.title: Caddyshack
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned in the r/Cinema sports comedy thread and the general 80s comedy list. An iconic sports comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Major League
ranked_movies.reason: A top recommendation in the r/Cinema sports comedy thread. A beloved and iconic baseball comedy.

ranked_movies.title: The Blues Brothers
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the 80s comedy list and the 'bad band' movie thread. A iconic musical comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Evil Dead 2
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the r/horror comedy thread. Known for its perfect blend of horror and slapstick comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Army of Darkness
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the r/horror comedy thread. The third entry in the Evil Dead series, known for its campy, comedic tone.

ranked_movies.title: What We Do in the Shadows
ranked_movies.reason: Listed by the OP in the r/horror thread and recommended in the general comedy suggestions thread. A highly popular mockumentary.

ranked_movies.title: Spaceballs
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently listed in the 80s comedy recommendations and the general comedy suggestions. A classic Mel Brooks spoof.

ranked_movies.title: Return of the Living Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the r/horror comedy thread. Described as the 'gold standard' for balancing comedy and horror.

ranked_movies.title: Hera Pheri
ranked_movies.reason: The top recommendation in the r/delhi thread for Hindi comedy movies. A cult classic in Indian cinema.
